prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle recovery and strength gains with high protein intake

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers one full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
Each meal prioritizes protein with macronutrient ratio approximately 40% protein, 35% carbohydrates, 25% fats
Total daily calories and protein targets are appropriate for an 85kg strength athlete
task_description: Write a compact, concise, one day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) requiring protein-focused meals for muscle recovery with specific macronutrient ratios

prompt_inputs.goal: Endurance performance for a 120km cycling event in 5 days

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers one full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
All foods are vegan with no animal products
Includes nutrient-dense plant-based proteins, carbohydrates, and healthy fats suitable for endurance cycling
Plan is compact and concise (suitable for quick reference)
task_description: Write a compact, concise, one day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an athlete with dietary restrictions (vegan endurance cyclist) requiring nutrient-dense plant-based alternatives while meeting performance nutrition needs

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon preparation with carbohydrate loading for sustained endurance performance

solution_criteria: Carbohydrates comprise 55-65% of total calories for endurance fuel
Includes 5-6 meals/snacks distributed throughout the day for sustained energy
All meals are practical and consumable within a single day
task_description: Write a compact, concise, one day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 4000+ calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and sustained energy
